basic_details.job_title: BMRCL Deputy General Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Bangalore Metro Rail Corporation (BMRCL) Deputy General Manager (Operation Safety) Notification 2026 has been released on 13 July 2026 on the official website https://english.bmrc.co.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BMRCL Deputy General Manager (Operation Safety) Recruitment 2026.

salary_details.details: Rs. 1,64,000/- p.m (Contract) / Parent pay (Deputation) / Rs. 1,26,746/- p.m (Retired)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BMRCL Deputy General Manager (Operation Safety) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BMRCL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BMRCL Deputy General Manager (Operation Safety) Recruitment 2026 - Overview
BMRCL Deputy General Manager (Operation Safety) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the BMRCL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download BMRCL Deputy General Manager (Operation Safety) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: BMRCL Deputy General Manager (Operation Safety) Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BMRCL Deputy General Manager (Operation Safety) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BMRCL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BMRCL Deputy General Manager (Operation Safety) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BMRCL Deputy General Manager (Operation Safety) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications for the BMRCL Deputy General Manager (Operation Safety) position is 13 August 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Deputy General Manager (Operation Safety) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Deputy General Manager (Operation Safety) in the Bangalore Metro Rail Corporation (BMRCL) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Deputy General Manager (Operation Safety) post is Graduation or Engineering in any discipline.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Deputy General Manager (Operation Safety) position?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 126746 to Rs. 164000 per month, depending on the mode of recruitment (contract, deputation, or retired).

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Deputy General Manager (Operation Safety) post will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website of BMRCL.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location for this position?
faq.answer: The job is located in Bengaluru, Karnataka.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is BMRCL/HR/0005/PRJ/2026.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, applications for the BMRCL Deputy General Manager (Operation Safety) recruitment must be submitted online only. Offline applications will not be accepted.
